videos.title: Logi New Plugins #logioptionsplus #tech #logitech
videos.description:
Your favourite productivity apps just joined the Logi Marketplace 👀
Microsoft Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Slack, and Notion are now supported with MX mice, keyboards, and MX Creative Console.
From editing docs faster to staying on top of chats and projects, your workflow just got a serious upgrade ⚡
Watch to see how to set everything up and streamline the apps you already use every day.
Which apps should we add next? 👇

videos.title: Master Your Meetings: Use Logi Options+ to Customize Signature Comfort Plus Video Keys
videos.description:
Ready to take control of your virtual meetings with a single tap?

In this tutorial, we show you how to maximize the potential of your Signature Comfort Plus keyboard using the Logi Options+ App. Learn how to use the dedicated video conferencing keys to instantly mute or unmute your microphone and start or stop your video without searching for on-screen buttons. We walk you through four simple steps to connect your device via Bluetooth and customize these keys for your favorite meeting platforms

videos.title: Logitech Signature Comfort Plus Tutorial: Personalize Your F-Row Keys
videos.description:
Have you ever wondered if you can make your F-row keys do more than just the usual functions?

In this tutorial, learn how to fully customize the F-row keys on your Logitech Signature Comfort Plus keyboard using the Logi Options+ App. We walk you through four quick steps to transform your workflow: downloading the latest software from app.logi.com, connecting your device via Bluetooth, and navigating the intuitive Logi Options+ interface. videos.title: Meet Signature Comfort Plus combo
videos.description:
Work-life is a lot 😅
Meet Signature Comfort Plus, the wireless combo designed for all-day comfort, smoother workflows, and less desk-day fatigue. ✨
From the cushioned mouse and curved palmrest to Smart Actions, Easy-Switch, and AI shortcuts, everything’s built to help you work more comfortably across every device.
Plus: get 6 months of Perplexity Pro included with eligible purchases on Logitech.com 👀

videos.title: How to Customize Logitech Signature Comfort Plus: Pointer & Scroller Settings
videos.description:
Do you want your mouse to feel just right for your workflow?

Learn how to fine-tune your Logitech Signature Comfort Plus mouse using the Logi Options+ App to match your exact preferences for comfort and efficiency. This step-by-step guide walks you through downloading the software, connecting your device via Bluetooth, and navigating the pointer and scroller settings. videos.description:

videos.title: How to Use Enhanced Easy-Switch on the Logitech Signature Comfort Plus Keyboard with Logi Options+
videos.description:
Do you wish you could connect your keyboard and mouse to multiple devices and switch between them with just a single key press? Now you can! The Enhanced Easy-Switch feature enables your Logitech Signature Comfort Plus mouse to automatically follow your paired keyboard when you switch between computers, making device hopping truly effortless. 

In this video, Joe walks you through every step to set up and use this feature, so you can boost productivity and work smarter.
